title: Y-Strainer / Filter Specs
description: Technical specifications schema for Y-strainer filters (Filtros). 35 fields from PIM catalog.

dn.title: DN (Nominal Diameter)
dn.description: Diámetro nominal — e.g. DN15, DN25, DN50

dn_real.title: DN Real (Internal Bore Diameter)
dn_real.description: Diámetro agujero interno — actual internal bore diameter

size.title: Size (Flange or Thread)
size.description: Size designation for flange or thread connections — e.g. 1/2", DN50

materials_body.title: Body Material
materials_body.description: Materiales Cuerpo — body material (e.g. brass, cast iron, stainless steel)

materials_screen.title: Screen / Strainer Material
materials_screen.description: Materiales Tamiz — screen/strainer basket material (e.g. stainless steel 304, 316)

materials_gaskets.title: Gasket / Seal Material
materials_gaskets.description: Materiales Juntas — gasket and sealing material (e.g. NBR, EPDM, PTFE)

fabrication_method.title: Fabrication Method
fabrication_method.description: Método de fabricación — e.g. casting, forging

actuator.title: Actuator Type
actuator.description: Accionador — if motorized or with indicator

connections.title: Connection Ends
connections.description: Conexión 1/2 — typically 2 connection ends (inlet and outlet)

dn.title: Connection DN
dn.description: Nominal diameter of this connection end

threading.title: Thread Standard
threading.description: Thread designation — e.g. BSP, NPT, ISO

dim_L.title: Dimension L (Face-to-Face)
dim_L.description: Dimensión L — face-to-face length in mm (Entre caras)

dim_H.title: Dimension H (Axis to Screen Plug)
dim_H.description: Dimension H — height from pipe axis to screen plug centre in mm (Desde eje a tapon tamiz)

dim_w1.title: Dimension w1 (Screen 1 Hole Width)
dim_w1.description: Dimensión w1 — screen 1 hole width in mm (Anchura agujero tamiz 1)

dim_d1.title: Dimension d1 (Screen 1 Hole Height)
dim_d1.description: Dimension d1 — screen 1 hole height in mm (Altura agujero tamiz 1)

dim_w2.title: Dimension w2 (Screen 2 Hole Width)
dim_w2.description: Dimensión w2 — screen 2 hole width in mm for double-screen (Anchura agujero tamiz 2)

dim_d2.title: Dimension d2 (Screen 2 Hole Height)
dim_d2.description: Dimension d2 — screen 2 hole height in mm for double-screen (Altura agujero tamiz 2)

dim_T1.title: Dimension T1 (Thread Length End 1)
dim_T1.description: Dimensión T1 — thread engagement length end 1 in mm (Longitud rosca 1)

dim_T2.title: Dimension T2 (Thread Length End 2)
dim_T2.description: Dimensión T2 — thread engagement length end 2 in mm (Longitud rosca 2)

dim_D.title: Dimension D (Flange OD)
dim_D.description: Dimensión D — flange outer diameter in mm (Diámetro exterior brida)

dim_K.title: Dimension K (Bolt Circle Diameter)
dim_K.description: Dimensión K — bolt hole pitch circle diameter in mm (Diametro agujeros brida)

kv1.title: Flow Coefficient Kv1 (Screen 1)
kv1.description: Kv1 — flow coefficient for screen 1 configuration (m³/h at 1 bar ΔP)

kv2.title: Flow Coefficient Kv2 (Screen 2)
kv2.description: Kv2 — flow coefficient for screen 2 / double-screen configuration (m³/h at 1 bar ΔP)
